event_blocks.summary: The scene transitions from a home video of a Woman in Black Outfit crawling on the floor, surprising a second woman, to a vibrant talk show set featuring Ellen (Woman in Black Latex Dress), sporting a shiny black latex dress and top knot, and the Woman in Denim Jacket, seated in white armchairs across from a white coffee table adorned with a Sunflower Bouquet and Gold Mugs displaying the 'ellentube' logo. A Palm Tree Backdrop, lush greenery, and White Orchids create a sunny atmosphere. Ellen gestures animatedly, playfully remarking about almost wearing something else, while the Woman in Denim Jacket teases her about her "quiet, simple life," prompting sarcastic agreement from Ellen. The Woman in Denim Jacket admits to liking a quiet life herself, though it doesn't always work out. Ellen declares her intention to "excite" and "scare" her, referencing a past failed attempt at "Chris's birthday" where she planned to crawl out of the bathroom. The scene cuts back to the home video, where Ellen asks if the prank "worked," and the Woman in Denim Jacket notes the set's prettiness. A loud shriek is heard as Ellen expresses disappointment at the lack of reaction from the first woman in the home video, wishing it had been funnier. The Woman in Denim Jacket agrees, mentioning "Shadow would have cut it." Ellen explains they were at "Chris's other house" scaring "Portia," confirming the Woman in Denim Jacket's observation that Portia "gets scared really easily." Another home video shows Portia, in a white robe, crawling in a minimalist room, accompanied by suspenseful music, as two other women, one in a black top and white pants and another in a white shirt and yellow pants, react with laughter and a loud shriek. Back on the talk show set, Ellen gestures toward the screen displaying the home video, and the Woman in Denim Jacket comments on their skill, with the Ellentube Logo remaining visible throughout.

Gold Mugs.description: Two gold-colored mugs with the 'ellentube' logo, positioned on the coffee table.

Palm Tree Backdrop.description: A large screen displaying a scenic image of palm trees against a blue sky, serving as the main background of the set.

White Orchids.description: Large arrangements of white orchids in gray planters, visible in the background on both sides of the set.

Woman in Black Latex Dress.description: A woman with dark hair styled in a top knot, wearing a form-fitting, shiny black latex dress with a high neckline, seated in a white armchair, actively gesturing while speaking, asking 'Did it work?' about a prank, noting 'No, no reaction' from a previous prank victim, and explaining they were 'scaring Portia' at 'Chris's other house'.

Sunflower Bouquet.description: A bright yellow bouquet of sunflowers arranged in a green vase, placed on the white coffee table between the two women.

Ellentube Logo.description: The 'ellentube' watermark displayed in the bottom left corner of the screen throughout the segment.

Woman in Denim Jacket.description: A woman with short blonde hair, wearing a dark denim jacket over a navy shirt and dark pants, seated in a white armchair, listening and responding with expressive hand movements, remarking 'Everything else is so pretty,' agreeing that a prank 'would have been so much funnier' with a reaction, confirming that 'she gets scared really easily and it's so much fun' about Portia, and commenting, 'You guys are really good' after watching the home video.

Woman in Black Top and White Pants.description: A woman with long blonde hair, wearing a black sleeveless top and white pants, running into the room laughing.

Woman in White Robe.description: A woman with dark hair, wearing a white robe, crawling on the floor in a minimalist room with large windows and a potted plant, identified by the talk show hosts as 'Portia,' who 'gets scared really easily,' and whose loud shriek is heard during the home video.

Woman in White Shirt and Yellow Pants.description: A woman with short blonde hair, wearing a white shirt and bright yellow pants, following the woman in black top and white pants into the room.

raw_segments: The video opens on a vibrant talk show set, showcasing two women seated in white armchairs across a small white coffee table adorned with a bright sunflower bouquet and two 'ellentube' gold mugs. A backdrop of a blue sky with palm trees, along with lush greenery and white orchids, creates a polished, lively, and sunny atmosphere. The woman on the left, identified as Ellen, wearing a shiny black latex dress with a high neckline and her dark hair in a top knot, gestures animatedly as she speaks, playfully remarking, "Thank God I didn't wear that. I almost, almost did," which is met with laughter. The woman on the right, dressed in a dark denim jacket over a navy shirt, listens attentively, occasionally responding with expressive hand gestures. She asks Ellen, "What's going on? It seems like everything's quiet right now with you," prompting Ellen to respond with an ironic "As always." The conversation continues with the woman in the denim jacket teasing Ellen about her "quiet, simple life," to which Ellen sarcastically agrees, "Nobody, nothing going on, nobody likes to talk or anything." The woman in the denim jacket then reveals her own preference, stating, "You wouldn't believe this, but I actually like to live a really quiet, simple life," admitting it "doesn't always go as planned." Ellen, maintaining a playful tone, declares her intention to "excite you and put excitement in your life and scare you all the time." The woman in the denim jacket recalls a past attempt by Ellen to scare her, mentioning "Chris's birthday," leading Ellen to express frustration about her failed scare attempt, saying, "I was gonna crawl out of the bathroom." The segment concludes with the woman in the denim jacket playfully stating, "Ellen is like unscarable," as the 'ellentube' logo remains visible in the bottom left corner throughout the friendly and dynamic interaction.

The video begins with a home video clip showing a woman in a black outfit crawling on the floor in a modern, well-lit room. A second woman enters, reacting with surprise and amusement as the first woman continues crawling. The scene then cuts to a talk show set where the Woman in Black Latex Dress, with dark hair in a top knot, wearing a form-fitting, shiny black latex dress, and the Woman in Denim Jacket, with short blonde hair in a dark denim jacket, are seated in white armchairs. The Woman in Black Latex Dress gestures animatedly, asking if the prank "worked," while the Woman in Denim Jacket remarks, "Everything else is so pretty." A loud shriek is heard, followed by the Woman in Black Latex Dress noting the lack of reaction from the first woman in the home video, stating, "No, no reaction," and wishing it "would have been so much funnier" if she had crawled out. The Woman in Denim Jacket agrees, saying "Shadow would have cut it." The Woman in Black Latex Dress then explains they were at "Chris's other house" scaring "Portia," confirming the Woman in Denim Jacket's observation that "she gets scared really easily and it's so much fun." The video cuts back to another home video, showing a woman identified as Portia, in a white robe, crawling in a spacious, minimalist room with large windows, accompanied by suspenseful, upbeat background music. A second woman in a black top and white pants runs in laughing, followed by a third woman in a white shirt and yellow pants. A very loud shriek erupts, followed by laughter. The scene returns to the talk show set, where the Woman in Black Latex Dress gestures toward the screen displaying the home video, and the Woman in Denim Jacket comments, "You guys are really good." Between them on the white coffee table are a Sunflower Bouquet and two Gold Mugs with the 'ellentube' logo, against a Palm Tree Backdrop flanked by White Orchids, with the Ellentube Logo visible in the bottom left corner throughout.

Gold Mugs.description: Two gold-colored mugs with the 'ellentube' logo, positioned on the coffee table.

Palm Tree Backdrop.description: A large screen displaying a scenic image of palm trees against a blue sky, serving as the main background of the set.

Backstage Monitor.description: A blue screen displaying 'ellen FAREWELL SEASON' in white text, mounted on the wall in the dimly lit backstage hallway, providing context for the conversation about the show ending.

White Orchids.description: Large arrangements of white orchids in gray planters, visible in the background on both sides of the set.

Woman in Black Latex Dress.description: A woman with dark hair styled in a top knot, wearing a form-fitting, shiny black latex dress with a high neckline, seated in a white armchair. She actively gestures while speaking, expressing things are "really cute," confirming details with "Yes," and explaining concepts like a permanent "scar," often laughing warmly.

Sunflower Bouquet.description: A bright yellow bouquet of sunflowers arranged in a green vase, placed on the white coffee table between the two women.

Ellentube Logo.description: The 'ellentube' watermark displayed in the bottom left corner of the screen throughout the segment.

Woman in Denim Jacket.description: A woman with short blonde hair, wearing a dark denim jacket over a navy shirt and dark pants, seated in a white armchair. She listens attentively, responds with expressive hand movements, and frequently interjects with exclamations like "Wow" and "That's amazing." She asks questions about "branding," makes playful comments like "you are a brand," and shares her thoughts, often laughing warmly with her conversational partner.

Red and Yellow Caution Mat.description: A striped red and yellow mat on the floor in the backstage area, near the entrance to the studio set.

raw_segments: The video opens in a brightly lit talk show studio, where the Woman in Black Latex Dress, with dark hair in a top knot, and the Woman in Denim Jacket, with short blonde hair, are seated in white armchairs. A vibrant Palm Tree Backdrop under a blue sky, flanked by White Orchids, sets the scene, with a Sunflower Bouquet and two Gold Mugs bearing the 'ellentube' logo on a white coffee table between them. The Woman in Black Latex Dress, speaking with a playful tone, mentions how "my mom, Portia and Ellen do all day long is try to scare people," challenging the Woman in Denim Jacket by saying, "you have no idea what's coming for you." The Woman in Denim Jacket responds, "Now that you're gonna have some free time," to which the Woman in Black Latex Dress confidently replies, "Bring it on." The Woman in Denim Jacket then recounts, "I tried to get her today. You say you got scared... this is uh Kim arriving today," with the Woman in Black Latex Dress adding, "It was a delayed reaction." The scene abruptly cuts to a dimly lit backstage hallway with industrial elements, where the two women walk together, laughing. The Woman in Denim Jacket holds a drink, and the Woman in Black Latex Dress carries a small item. A monitor in the hallway displays 'ellen FAREWELL SEASON' in blue text. As they walk, the Woman in Denim Jacket exclaims, "I'm so excited your show's going off the air," which is also shown as a subtitle. Suddenly, a loud, high-pitched scream and a distinct "BOING" sound erupt, followed by the Woman in Black Latex Dress screaming "That way!" and a sustained alarm-like sound, indicating a jump scare. Both women burst into laughter, with the Woman in Denim Jacket asking, "Was that a heart attack?" and the Woman in Black Latex Dress responding, "What are you doing?" The segment returns to the studio set amidst audience applause and laughter. The Woman in Black Latex Dress, still laughing, declares, "Don't worry, I'll start taking videos and I'll I'll be posting it. So you guys will see, you'll finally get to see me scare Ellen. I'm gonna make it my mission." The Woman in Denim Jacket confidently retorts, "You won't scare me. People have tried for years," before the Woman in Black Latex Dress conspiratorially whispers, "I just thought of the best idea." The 'ellentube' watermark remains visible throughout.

The segment opens on a bright, engaging talk show set, featuring a Woman in Black Latex Dress and a Woman in Denim Jacket seated in white armchairs across a white coffee table adorned with a Sunflower Bouquet and Gold Mugs. White Orchids flank the set against a vibrant Palm Tree Backdrop, with the Ellentube Logo visible in the bottom left. The Woman in Black Latex Dress, with dark hair in a top knot, acknowledges with a clear "Okay," as the Woman in Denim Jacket, with short blonde hair, asks if she just thought of a fantastic idea, adding she'll "need Porsche on this one." The Woman in Black Latex Dress, in her shiny black latex dress, responds, "All right. I'm I'm I'm just open to it. I don't think it's gonna happen," gesturing expressively. The Woman in Denim Jacket then shifts the conversation, stating, "Um hey, speaking of uh posting, you just went official with with Pete on Instagram. So congratulations," prompting enthusiastic audience applause and cheering. The Woman in Black Latex Dress thanks them, then muses, "I guess it's like not official until you post," to which the Woman in Denim Jacket clarifies, "You what? It's a I guess it's not official until you post, it's not real." The Woman in Black Latex Dress agrees, "Yeah. Yeah." The Woman in Denim Jacket continues, asking if posting was something she "needed to do just to get it out of the way," as if "people were waiting to see that." The Woman in Black Latex Dress passionately explains, "No, I have the cutest pictures of us and I want to be like, oh my god, we're so cute. And I want, you know, but then I'm like, you know, don't be so desperate, don't be posting so much, just give a glimpse," using animated hand movements. As she speaks, the Palm Tree Backdrop transitions to a black-and-white image of a woman with sunglasses and a sequined top holding a guitar, appearing to be a promotional image. The Woman in Black Latex Dress continues, "So, I don't know. I don't I don't know what the right thing to do is. Like I haven't dated in since before Instagram existed," revealing her uncertainty and personal history. The Woman in Denim Jacket interjects, "Yeah, I I don't know," and the Woman in Black Latex Dress acknowledges, "I know," before the Woman in Denim Jacket finishes, "What the rules are," and the Woman in Black Latex Dress begins a new thought, "First of all, as a". The camera alternates between wide shots and close-ups, capturing their dynamic interaction throughout the bright and engaging segment.

The video opens in a brightly lit, modern talk show studio, featuring white orchids in gray planters, a large wooden sculpture, and the Ellentube Logo visible in the bottom left. A close-up shows the Woman in Denim Jacket, with short blonde hair, seated in a white armchair, speaking expressively with hand gestures. She tells the Woman in Black Latex Dress, "I just want you to be happy. You deserve to be happy and I'm happy that you're happy. That's all that matters." The camera cuts to the Woman in Black Latex Dress, with dark hair in a top knot and wearing a shiny black latex dress, who responds with a grateful "Thank you," followed by audience applause. She then enthusiastically adds, "Yeah. It feels good. Yeah. It feels good." The Woman in Denim Jacket observes a "shift" and "ease" in her, noting, "it's a different you." The Woman in Black Latex Dress, using animated hand movements, shares her philosophy: "I just think I encourage my friends and my the people that I love just to be happy." She recounts her personal journey, stating with determination, "I went for it... I'm in my 40s, like, sorry. Like just go for it. Find your happiness." She continues, "I went for it and I took my time and I found it and it feels so good and I want to hold on to that forever." The Woman in Denim Jacket affirms with a supportive "Yeah. Good," as applause erupts again. A wide shot reveals both women seated across a white coffee table adorned with a Sunflower Bouquet and two Gold Mugs, against a scenic Palm Tree Backdrop. The Woman in Denim Jacket then transitions to her role as interviewer, asking, "I have to ask, it's my job as an interviewer to ask about the tattoo," referencing a social media post. Their dynamic interaction, marked by eye contact and gestures, suggests a lively and engaging dialogue.

On a brightly lit talk show set adorned with large arrangements of White Orchids and a modern backdrop featuring blue lighting, the 'ellentube' watermark is visible in the bottom left. Two women are seated in white armchairs, engaged in a dynamic conversation. The Woman in Denim Jacket, with short blonde hair, wearing a dark denim jacket, initiates the discussion by asking about a tattoo that says 'Kim.' The Woman in Black Latex Dress, with dark hair in a top knot and a shiny black latex dress, responds animatedly, using expressive hand gestures. She clarifies that while 'he has a few tattoos,' the 'Kim one isn't a tattoo, it's actually a branding,' explaining that 'he wanted to do something that was really different.' She recounts her initial reactions to his 'cute' tattoos, describing them with a light, conversational tone. The Woman in Denim Jacket listens attentively, occasionally gesturing, then interjects, 'Wait, back up, back up, back up. You said first tattoo, so he has three tattoos of you?' The Woman in Black Latex Dress hesitates briefly before confirming, 'The branding is my name.' She then elaborates that 'the other ones are like cutesy things,' revealing her 'favorite one' says, 'my girl is a lawyer.' Both women maintain active eye contact and shift focus between each other, contributing to the lively and engaging atmosphere as the camera alternates between close-ups.

The segment opens with a close-up of the Woman in Black Latex Dress, seated in a white armchair, smiling and gesturing as she speaks, remarking "really cute." The camera then cuts to the Woman in Denim Jacket, who listens attentively, occasionally responding with expressive hand movements and a warm smile, interjecting with "Wow" and "That's amazing." She inquires about a "lawyer" and another person, to which the Woman in Black Latex Dress replies, "There's a few." Their lively conversation continues, with the Woman in Denim Jacket describing "branding" as "literally like an iron thing went onto his body to brand Kim," which the Woman in Black Latex Dress confirms with a clear "Yes." Both women share a laugh as the Woman in Denim Jacket playfully states, "Well, you, you are a brand," prompting more laughter from the Woman in Black Latex Dress. The Woman in Denim Jacket exclaims "Wow!" before the Woman in Black Latex Dress elaborates on the concept, explaining someone's desire for a permanent mark "as like a scar" that can't be removed like tattoos. The Woman in Denim Jacket reacts with "Wow," noting it's "faster too than just sitting for a tattoo... just to get branded," leading to shared laughter. The Woman in Denim Jacket muses, "I gotta think about this," as the Woman in Black Latex Dress declares, "It's so cute, guys." The Woman in Denim Jacket agrees, calling it "adorable." The brightly lit talk show studio, featuring white armchairs, a white coffee table adorned with a Sunflower Bouquet and two Gold Mugs, and large arrangements of White Orchids against a Palm Tree Backdrop, provides a cheerful and inviting setting. The Ellentube Logo remains consistently visible in the bottom left corner throughout, as the camera pulls back to a wide shot, revealing both women laughing and interacting warmly, with the full set design and background elements clearly visible.

event_blocks.summary: In a brightly lit studio with a Palm Tree Backdrop and White Orchids, Kim Kardashian, the Woman in Black Latex Dress, is interviewed by the Woman in Denim Jacket, the host, seated in white armchairs with a Sunflower Bouquet and 'ellentube' Gold Mugs on the coffee table. The host introduces Kim, acknowledging the 'love thrown at you' and the 'judgment' she faces, particularly regarding 'everything that's going on with Kanye' and her protective stance for the children's sake. Kim responds, thanking the host and discussing her parents as a 'good example' for relationships, stating, 'no matter what goes on, you know, it's the father of my kids, I'll always be protective.' A Family Portrait on Backdrop featuring Kim and her children appears on the screen behind them, visually reinforcing her words about wanting her kids to 'just see the best of the best.' The conversation shifts to Kim's life philosophy, with her stating, 'I just live my life the way that I think is right and that I feel is right in my soul and just push forward and do the best that I can,' emphasizing moving on and being a good person. The host then presents the Vogue Magazine Cover featuring Kim with the headline 'KIM'S NEW WORLD' and subtext 'I'VE CHOSEN MYSELF,' commenting on her 'uncomfortable outfit,' to which Kim humorously replies, 'That's my style!' Kim elaborates on her fashion choices, contrasting her home attire of 'pajamas and sweats, no makeup' with her willingness to wear 'literally anything' when going out, even if 'uncomfortable' or requiring extreme measures like wearing a diaper. She humorously admits to buying adult diapers in preparation for the bar exam but never using them. The backdrop screen cycles through images, including the Vogue cover, an Orange Gown Image, and a Yellow Patterned Jumpsuit Image. The conversation touches on North styling the Vogue photoshoot, with Kim describing the chaotic experience of photoshoots with her children as 'the worst day of my life,' despite the 'amazing pictures.' The Ellentube Logo is consistently visible in the bottom left corner throughout the segment.

Gold Mugs.description: Two gold-colored mugs with the 'ellentube' logo, positioned on the coffee table.

Palm Tree Backdrop.description: A large screen displaying a scenic image of palm trees against a blue sky, serving as the main background of the set.

White Orchids.description: Large arrangements of white orchids in gray planters, visible in the background on both sides of the set.

Woman in Black Latex Dress.description: A woman with dark hair styled in a top knot, wearing a form-fitting, shiny black latex dress with a high neckline, seated in a white armchair, actively gesturing while speaking. She is identified as Kim, humorously recounting her experience preparing for the bar exam with adult diapers, and later discussing the challenges and outcomes of photoshoots with her children, specifically for a Vogue spread where her daughter North styled the family.

Sunflower Bouquet.description: A bright yellow bouquet of sunflowers arranged in a green vase, placed on the white coffee table between the two women.

Ellentube Logo.description: The 'ellentube' watermark displayed in the bottom left corner of the screen throughout the segment.

Family Portrait on Backdrop.description: A large screen image showing the Woman in Black Latex Dress (Kim) standing with three children: one in a shiny pink outfit, one in black, and one in a dark hoodie, displayed as the backdrop changes during the conversation. This image is directly related to the discussion about the Vogue photoshoot and the children's styling.

Woman in Denim Jacket.description: A woman with short blonde hair, wearing a dark denim jacket over a navy shirt and dark pants, seated in a white armchair, listening attentively, occasionally responding with hand gestures and questions like 'Got it', and initiating the conversation about the Vogue magazine feature.

Orange Gown Image.description: A full-body image of the Woman in Black Latex Dress in a flowing orange gown, posing with one hand on her head, displayed on the large screen behind the hosts.

Vogue Magazine Cover.description: A large screen displaying the cover of Vogue magazine featuring the Woman in Black Latex Dress (Kim), with the headline 'KIM'S NEW WORLD' and subtext 'I'VE CHOSEN MYSELF', along with other text like 'BODY LANGUAGE' and 'FITTING IN'. This cover is explicitly discussed by both women, highlighting Kim's children's involvement and her daughter North's styling contribution.

Yellow Patterned Jumpsuit Image.description: A full-body image of the Woman in Black Latex Dress in a bold yellow patterned jumpsuit with sunglasses, displayed on the large screen behind the hosts.

raw_segments: The segment opens in a bright, professionally lit studio, featuring Kim Kardashian, the Woman in Black Latex Dress, and the Woman in Denim Jacket, identified as the host, seated across from each other in white armchairs. A vibrant Sunflower Bouquet and two 'ellentube' branded Gold Mugs rest on the white coffee table between them, while a Palm Tree Backdrop and White Orchids in gray planters create a sunny, tropical ambiance. The host, speaking clearly and conversationally, introduces Kim Kardashian, praising her as a 'good person' and noting the 'so much going on in your life' and the 'love thrown at you.' She gestures expressively, leaning forward as she discusses the 'judgment' Kim faces, specifically mentioning 'everything that's going on with Kanye' and how Kim is 'always protective of him because of the kids.' Kim Kardashian, listening attentively and occasionally making subtle hand movements, responds with a 'Thank you' and then speaks articulately about her parents as a 'good example' for relationships. As she continues, stating 'no matter what goes on, you know, it's the father of my kids, I'll always be protective,' the backdrop screen changes around the 50-second mark to display a large Family Portrait featuring Kim with her three children, visually underscoring her words. She concludes by emphasizing her desire for her kids to 'just see the best of the best.' The Ellentube Logo remains consistently visible in the bottom left corner throughout this warm, conversational talk show segment.

The segment opens with a close-up of the Woman in Black Latex Dress, seated in a white armchair, speaking expressively with hand gestures. She reflects on trying to ignore challenges and doing what's best for her kids. The camera then pulls back to a wide shot, revealing the talk show set where she is engaged in conversation with the Woman in Denim Jacket, seated across from her. The Woman in Denim Jacket responds, "That's what I love about you," which is met with a burst of studio applause. The Woman in Denim Jacket continues, noting that taking the high road is hard sometimes because people judge what they see without knowing all the underlying layers. As she speaks, the backdrop transitions from a Family Portrait on Backdrop, showing the Woman in Black Latex Dress with three children, to a scenic Palm Tree Backdrop, enhancing the bright studio atmosphere. The Woman in Black Latex Dress then takes over, maintaining her animated hand gestures, explaining that she views challenges as lessons placed in her life for a reason. She describes her process of trying to sit still, understand the lesson, and figure out how to get through it, acknowledging that it might sound "super Zen." She further elaborates on her personal growth, stating she has to get better at things and used to care too much about narratives and what's true or not true on any subject. The set remains decorated with White Orchids in gray planters, a Sunflower Bouquet and two Gold Mugs with the 'ellentube' logo on the white coffee table between them, and the Ellentube Logo is consistently visible in the bottom left corner.

The segment opens with a close-up of the Woman in Black Latex Dress, later identified as Kim, who animatedly speaks with clear, expressive tones about living her life authentically, stating, "I just live my life the way that I think is right and that I feel is right in my soul and just push forward and do the best that I can," emphasizing the importance of moving on and being a good person. The setting is a brightly lit talk show studio with a modern aesthetic, featuring a blue-lit backdrop, greenery, and white orchids. The camera then cuts to a wide shot, revealing the Woman in Denim Jacket seated across from Kim in a white armchair, as the audience—wearing blue masks—claps and cheers loudly. The two women are positioned around a white coffee table adorned with a Sunflower Bouquet and two Gold Mugs. The Woman in Denim Jacket, speaking clearly, holds up a copy of Vogue magazine, showing the cover featuring Kim with the headline 'KIM'S NEW WORLD' and subtext 'I'VE CHOSEN MYSELF'. She comments on Kim being on the cover in an "uncomfortable outfit," to which Kim, with a slight laugh, responds, "That's my style!" The Woman in Denim Jacket then asks if Kim wears anything else, noting her preference for sweatpants, but that people "only see you in things that you can hardly move in." Kim clarifies that she'll be in "pajamas at home, pajamas and sweats, no makeup," but when she goes out, she'll wear "literally anything," adding, "I don't care how uncomfortable, I don't care how long I have to... if I have to wear a diaper and not go to the bathroom." The Woman in Denim Jacket asks if she's done that, and Kim replies, "No," but admits, "I bought, honestly, I bought, I actually bought adult diapers when I..." As they converse, the large screen behind them cycles through images: first, the Vogue cover, then a striking photo of Kim in a flowing orange gown, followed by another image of her in a bold yellow patterned jumpsuit. Kim continues to speak expressively, using hand gestures to emphasize her points, while the Woman in Denim Jacket listens attentively and responds. The atmosphere is lively and celebratory, underscored by the audience's engagement and the vibrant visuals on the backdrop, with the Ellentube Logo visible in the bottom left corner throughout.

The segment opens with a close-up of the Woman in Black Latex Dress, identified as Kim, animatedly recounting a humorous story about preparing for the bar exam, including buying adult diapers, while gesturing with both hands. She is seated in a white armchair, wearing a shiny black latex dress with a high neckline and her dark hair in a top knot. The Woman in Denim Jacket, with short blonde hair and wearing a dark denim jacket, listens attentively, occasionally responding with a 'Got it' and asking if Kim had to take them off, prompting laughter from both as Kim confirms she never used them. The camera then cuts to a wider shot, revealing both women seated across from each other, separated by a white coffee table holding a bright yellow Sunflower Bouquet and two Gold Mugs with the 'ellentube' logo. The Woman in Denim Jacket shifts the conversation, pointing to the large screen behind them, which displays the 'Vogue Magazine Cover' featuring Kim with the headline 'KIM'S NEW WORLD' and subtext 'I'VE CHOSEN MYSELF', alongside a 'Family Portrait on Backdrop' showing Kim with her children. She mentions the kids are in the Vogue issue and that 'North styled the whole thing.' Kim confirms her daughter North styled the photoshoot, explaining how North rejected the initial all-black attire as 'so boring' and took charge of dressing everyone. Kim humorously describes photoshoots with her kids as 'the worst day of my life,' vowing 'I'll never do it again,' but acknowledges the 'amazing pictures' that result, despite the chaos of crying children and difficulty getting them to pose together. White Orchids in gray planters frame the bright, studio-like set, and the Ellentube Logo remains visible, reinforcing the engaging and dynamic conversational atmosphere centered on family, fashion, and personal identity.

event_blocks.summary: On a brightly lit talk show set, the Woman in Black Latex Dress (Kim Kardashian) and the Woman in Denim Jacket (host) sat across a white coffee table adorned with a Sunflower Bouquet and two Gold Mugs, flanked by White Orchids, with the Ellentube Logo visible. The host animatedly discussed studying behind the scenes and cool access, while the Woman in Black Latex Dress recounted witnessing Kourtney and Travis non-stop making out at Kris's house for her birthday, even at the dinner table. The backdrop transitioned from a 'POWERBALL DOUBLE PLAY' screen to a series of romantic images: a couple embracing on stairs, a couple in a desert, and a couple kissing by a lake. The Woman in Black Latex Dress expressed surprise about Kourtney wanting a baby, thinking she was done, to which the host explained viewers would see their journey and that when you find love you can't live without, there's still a chance for a baby, even in one's early 40s, as they share their whole story. Earlier, the Woman in Black Latex Dress explained their content felt current and newsy, allowing viewers to see it all in real time, unlike past delays of 8 to 10 months. The host highlighted the unexpected nature of events, like the Woman in Black Latex Dress's SNL hosting leading to meeting Pete and the unique behind-the-scenes access. The Woman in Black Latex Dress emphasized the rarity of filming the entire SNL process, admitting she had no idea what she was getting into. The backdrop then shifted to a collage including a Vogue Magazine Cover featuring Kim Kardashian and a Family Portrait, before transitioning to a Palm Tree Backdrop as the host asked Kim about being nervous shifting to a different production company for 'THE KARDASHIANS.' Kim explained it was nerve-wracking to change after 15 years but they wanted it to be different and that the new team felt like family, bringing new energy and a different perspective. The backdrop then changed to a promotional image for 'THE KARDASHIANS' on Hulu, and Kim concluded that viewers would love it as it's more documentary-style.

Gold Mugs.description: Two gold-colored mugs with the 'ellentube' logo, positioned on the coffee table.

Palm Tree Backdrop.description: A large screen displaying a scenic image of palm trees against a blue sky, serving as the main background of the set.

White Orchids.description: Large arrangements of white orchids in gray planters, visible in the background on both sides of the set.

Woman in Black Latex Dress.description: A woman with dark hair styled in a top knot, wearing a form-fitting, shiny black latex dress with a high neckline, seated in a white armchair. She listens attentively and responds with engaged, expressive gestures, her voice heard recounting a story about Kourtney and Travis and later asking with surprise about them wanting a baby, having thought 'she was done'.

Vogue Magazine Cover.description: A large screen displaying the cover of Vogue magazine featuring the Woman in Black Latex Dress, with the headline 'KIM'S NEW WORLD' and subtext 'I'VE CHOSEN MYSELF', along with other text like 'BODY LANGUAGE' and 'FITTING IN'.

Sunflower Bouquet.description: A bright yellow bouquet of sunflowers arranged in a green vase, placed on the white coffee table between the two women.

Ellentube Logo.description: The 'ellentube' watermark displayed in the bottom left corner of the screen throughout the segment.

THE KARDASHIANS Promotional Image.description: A large screen displaying a group of five women in elegant, neutral-toned dresses with the text 'hulu THE KARDASHIANS' prominently featured, serving as the backdrop during the latter part of the segment, directly correlating with the discussion about the new season of the show.

Family Portrait on Backdrop.description: A large screen image showing the Woman in Black Latex Dress standing with three children: one in a shiny pink outfit, one in black, and one in a dark hoodie, displayed as the backdrop changes during the conversation.

Woman in Denim Jacket.description: A woman with short blonde hair, wearing a dark denim jacket over a navy shirt and dark pants, seated in a white armchair. She speaks animatedly with expressive hand movements, her voice heard discussing 'studying behind the scenes' and the 'cool access' they have, confirming Kourtney and Travis's constant making out, and later explaining their 'journey' to have a baby after finding love.

Pink Jumpsuit Image.description: A full-body image of the Woman in Black Latex Dress in a vibrant pink, textured jumpsuit, standing on a stage with a warm, golden-lit backdrop, displayed on the large screen behind the hosts.

Couple by Lake Image.description: A large screen image showing a couple kissing by a lake, with the man’s back covered in tattoos and the woman in a purple bikini top, displayed as the backdrop changes.

Powerball Double Play Backdrop.description: A large screen displaying a woman in a pink dress holding a microphone, with the text 'POWERBALL DOUBLE PLAY' visible at the top, serving as the initial backdrop.

Couple on Stairs Image.description: A large screen image showing a couple embracing on a staircase, with the woman in a striped dress and the man in black, displayed as the backdrop changes.

Couple in Desert Image.description: A large screen image showing a couple embracing in a desert landscape, with the woman in a patterned top and the man in black shorts, displayed as the backdrop changes.

raw_segments: The segment opens on a brightly lit talk show set, featuring the Woman in Black Latex Dress (identified as Kim Kardashian) and the Woman in Denim Jacket (the host) seated in white armchairs across a white coffee table adorned with a Sunflower Bouquet and two Gold Mugs. White Orchids flank the set, and the Ellentube Logo is visible in the bottom left. The host, the Woman in Denim Jacket, speaks animatedly, stating, "So, that's what we got. And it's so perfect and cute. It's they're fantastic, they're fantastic." The backdrop initially displays a collage including a Vogue Magazine Cover featuring Kim Kardashian and a Family Portrait. The host then announces, "Um, we're gonna take a break and uh we'll be back more with Kim." After a brief pause, she continues, "We're back with Kim Kardashian and that is the new, the brand new season, this is The Kardashians. Um, it's not this is it's The Kardashians." The backdrop transitions to a scenic Palm Tree Backdrop as the host asks Kim, "Um, and you took a little break and it's a whole different team, so were you nervous about shifting the way it was shot?" Kim, the Woman in Black Latex Dress, then responds, becoming more expressive with both hands, explaining, "Yeah, I mean imagine people that have been in your lives for 15 years shooting every single move... it was really nerve-wracking to change to a different production company... we wanted it to be a little bit different... And it's also the other production team, they're like family to us... we thought what if there's like new energy that can come in and just see us from a different perspective." As Kim speaks about the new season, the backdrop changes to a promotional image for 'THE KARDASHIANS' on Hulu, showing a group of women in elegant attire. Kim concludes, "And so I think you guys are really gonna love it. It's like way more documentary style. Um, and it feels very..." The dynamic conversation is punctuated by expressive body language and shifting visual elements.

The segment opens with a close-up of the Woman in Black Latex Dress, her dark hair styled in a top knot and shiny black latex dress reflecting the studio lights, as she animatedly explains how their content feels "current and newsy," allowing viewers to "see it all in real time" unlike past delays where they had to wait "8 months, 10 months sometimes." Lush greenery and white orchids in gray planters frame the blue-lit background. The camera then cuts to the Woman in Denim Jacket, who, with expressive hand movements, responds by highlighting the unexpected nature of events, specifically mentioning how the Woman in Black Latex Dress's SNL hosting led to meeting "Pete" and the unique access they had behind the scenes. A wider shot reveals both women seated across a white coffee table adorned with a bright yellow Sunflower Bouquet in a green vase and two 'ellentube' Gold Mugs. Behind them, a large screen displays an image of the Woman in Black Latex Dress in a vibrant pink, textured jumpsuit. The Woman in Black Latex Dress then continues, emphasizing the rarity of filming the "entire process" behind the scenes of SNL, admitting she "had no idea what I was getting myself into," while the 'ellentube' logo remains visible throughout the dynamic conversation.

The segment opens on a brightly lit talk show set, featuring the Woman in Black Latex Dress and the Woman in Denim Jacket seated in white armchairs across a white coffee table adorned with a Sunflower Bouquet and two Gold Mugs. White Orchids in gray planters flank the set, and the Ellentube Logo is visible in the bottom left. Initially, a large screen displays a 'POWERBALL DOUBLE PLAY' backdrop. The Woman in Denim Jacket, with short blonde hair, speaks animatedly, using expressive hand gestures, discussing 'studying behind the scenes' and the 'cool access' they have. The Woman in Black Latex Dress, with dark hair in a top knot, listens attentively before responding, her own gestures becoming engaged as she recounts being at 'Kris's house for her birthday' and witnessing 'Kourtney and Travis non-stop making out,' emphasizing it was 'all the time' even 'at the dinner table waiting.' The backdrop transitions to a series of romantic images: first, a couple embracing on stairs, then a couple in a desert, and finally a couple kissing by a lake with a tattooed man's back. The Woman in Denim Jacket interjects, confirming they were 'constantly making out' 'in between meals.' The Woman in Black Latex Dress then expresses surprise, asking if it's true that 'now they want a baby,' as she 'thought she was done.' The Woman in Denim Jacket responds, explaining that viewers 'will see their journey,' and that 'when you find love that you can't live without,' there's 'still a chance' for a baby, noting the woman is in her 'early 40s' and they 'share their whole story.' The lively conversation continues with both women actively participating.

event_blocks.summary: The Woman in Black Latex Dress, seated in a white armchair, gestures while discussing people's desire to see 'their' cuteness and making out, prompting audience laughter and applause. A wide shot reveals the Woman in Denim Jacket opposite her, also in a white armchair, expressing concern that a baby might be hungry if 'they' are constantly making out. Between them on a white coffee table, a Sunflower Bouquet in a green vase sits between two Gold Mugs with the 'ellentube' logo, set against a Palm Tree Backdrop on a large screen. The Woman in Black Latex Dress leans forward, smiling, and states that the situation is 'a terrible thing,' before announcing a break and promising more with the guest after. The segment concludes with a blue-tinted promotional graphic for 'The Farewell Season' featuring 'Don’t miss a moment! Check your local listings & tune in to watch!' and the 'ellen' logo, accompanied by upbeat instrumental music, while the Ellentube Logo remains in the bottom left corner.

Sunflower Bouquet.description: A bright yellow bouquet of sunflowers arranged in a green vase, placed on the white coffee table between the two women.

Woman in Denim Jacket.description: A woman with short blonde hair, wearing a dark denim jacket over a navy shirt and dark pants, seated in a white armchair, listening and responding with expressive hand movements, speaking in a distinct, slightly higher-pitched voice about her 'fear' regarding a baby.

Ellentube Logo.description: The 'ellentube' watermark displayed in the bottom left corner of the screen throughout the segment.

Gold Mugs.description: Two gold-colored mugs with the 'ellentube' logo, positioned on the coffee table.

Palm Tree Backdrop.description: A large screen displaying a scenic image of palm trees against a blue sky, serving as the main background of the set.

Woman in Black Latex Dress.description: A woman with dark hair styled in a top knot, wearing a form-fitting, shiny black latex dress with a high neckline, seated in a white armchair, actively gesturing while speaking in a clear, conversational tone, and later announcing a break.

raw_segments: The segment opens with a close-up of the Woman in Black Latex Dress, seated in a white armchair, actively gesturing as she speaks in a clear, conversational tone about people wanting to see how cute 'they' are and how much 'they' make out. This elicits immediate audience laughter and applause. The camera then pulls back to a wide shot, revealing the Woman in Denim Jacket seated across from her in a matching white armchair. The Woman in Denim Jacket, speaking in a distinct, slightly higher-pitched voice, expresses her 'fear' that if 'they' have a baby, it would be hungry while 'they' are just making out the whole time. Between them, on a white coffee table, sits a vibrant Sunflower Bouquet in a green vase, flanked by two Gold Mugs bearing the 'ellentube' logo. The backdrop is a large screen displaying a scenic Palm Tree Backdrop under a bright blue sky. As the conversation continues, both women laugh and interact warmly, with the Woman in Black Latex Dress leaning forward, smiling, and responding that she doesn't think 'it's a good thing, I think it's a terrible thing.' She then announces, 'We're gonna take a break, more with [guest's name] after this.' The scene transitions to a blue-tinted promotional graphic overlay that reads 'The Farewell Season' with the text 'Don’t miss a moment! Check your local listings & tune in to watch!' and the 'ellen' logo beneath, accompanied by upbeat, energetic instrumental music, signaling the end of the segment. The Ellentube Logo remains visible in the bottom left corner throughout.
